scripts.get-contracts: mkdir -p ./contracts/cosmos && rsync -avm --exclude='testdata/' --include='*/' --include='*.sol' --exclude='*' ../../../../precompiles/ ./contracts/cosmos/ && cp ../../../../contracts/solidity/TEERegistry.sol ./contracts/cosmos/ && cp ../../../../contracts/solidity/TEEInferenceVerifier.sol ./contracts/cosmos/ && cp ../../../../contracts/solidity/FacilitatorSettlementRelay.sol ./contracts/cosmos/ && sed -i.bak 's|./precompiles/tee/ITEEVerifier.sol|./tee/ITEEVerifier.sol|g' ./contracts/cosmos/TEERegistry.sol && sed -i.bak 's|./precompiles/tee/ITEEVerifier.sol|./tee/ITEEVerifier.sol|g' ./contracts/cosmos/TEEInferenceVerifier.sol && rm -f ./contracts/cosmos/*.bak
scripts.test-cosmos: yarn get-contracts && yarn truffle test --network cosmos && yarn clean-contracts
